説明文: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.
入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Lightning Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak

ワザ.効果: This attack does 10 damage for each of your Benched  Pokémon.
